positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical forest scene at dawn. The composition features overlapping silhouette elements of towering, curved deciduous trees, delicate wispy fog, and hidden glowing fauna. The style is inspired by Nordic folklore and abstract graphic design, using strong, flat color fields and crisp vector lines. Focus on high contrast between deep indigo and emerald green silhouettes, with key magical elements (like fireflies or glowing mushrooms) emitting soft, warm gold light. The overall aesthetic is suitable for screen printing on fabric, emphasizing negative space and clean, impactful shapes. Perfect central framing, highly detailed edge work, forest floor visible only by silhouette outline.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, low resolution, poor anatomy, artifacts, extra limbs, noise, messy, photorealistic, CGI, 3D render, hyperdetailed, logos, typography
